20.reason: The integer to be pushed (x) must be read before this check to consume input even when the stack is full; otherwise the next iteration will misinterpret x as a request.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  The integer to be pushed (x) must be read before this check to consume input even when the stack is full; otherwise the next iteration will misinterpret x as a request.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  The integer to push is not read when the stack is full; it should be read before this check to keep input synchronized.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  The integer to be pushed is not consumed from the input stream when the stack is full, causing subsequent reads to be misaligned. The scanf for x should be executed before checking the stack capacity.

23.reason: Skips reading the integer to be pushed, causing input desynchronization. The value should be read before checking capacity.
